productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex Mumbai Indians Navy Blue Backpack
description: CompositionNylon water resistant navy blue backpack with two main compartments, broad shoulder straps, wide base and the fiery ball logo of Mumbai IndiansWash careHand washGear up for the IPL series this season and head off to the stadium with this sturdy navy blue Mumbai Indians backpack. Spacious with two main compartments to carry all your essentials, and broad shoulder straps to ensure the weight of your belongings do not slow you down, this backpack is the best way to flaunt your support for the fighter team playing for Mumbai this IPL season. It's also a perfect bag for a weekend getaway and short trips as the nylon gives excellent durability.
